title: Copper Door Cutting
description: Adds recipes for all copper doors and trapdoors to the stonecutter!
body:
### Adds recipes for all copper doors and trapdoors to the stonecutter!

> Recipe example for doors:
> 
> ![Recipe for doors](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/834bb596b1c28052554da8a424706784cc868df4.png)

> Recipe Example for trapdoors:
> 
> ![Recipe for trapdoors](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eb838e0d683c7a9efd4fd7ac2dfda9108fae2ea7.png)

**Recipes work for all oxidation stages, waxed and unwaxed!**
